scripts.build: npm run build:talks && cp landing/index.html dist/index.html
scripts.build:kccn-eu-2026-agentic-ai: mkdir -p dist/kccn-eu-2026/images && marp KCCN-EU-Maintainer-Summit-2026/agentic-ai/presentation/slides.md --html --theme-set themes/cncf/cncf.css themes/maintainer-summit-2026/maintainer-summit-2026.css -o dist/kccn-eu-2026/index.html && cp -r themes/maintainer-summit-2026/images/. dist/kccn-eu-2026/images/
